content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 — user-facing string "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" in App/SettingsView.swift:12 may trigger review questions about an unfinished feature
Pierre: Apple's 2.2 flags App Store builds that present themselves as beta or unfinished, and "Experimental… may be unstable" is user-visible copy suggesting a work-in-progress feature. Metadata and release notes are clean, but this Settings string could prompt reviewer questions. Consider softening the wording (e.g. "Beta feature: sort order may vary") only if the feature is truly ready, or gating the label behind a clearer opt-in — verify the feature is production-quality.
